intent:
Produce a Timeline / Evolution report tracing the evolution of smartphone processors from 2007 to 2026. The report is NOT a buying guide; it is a chronological narrative + current-day taxonomy. The report must include the following:

- >= 120 sandbox URLs, >= 60 cited
- 3 sources: __SHOPPING__, __REDDIT__, __WIKIPEDIA__
- >= 30 __SHOPPING__ products (price + rating + feature_claim), >= 30 __REDDIT__ threads, >= 25 __WIKIPEDIA__ articles
- Mandatory __WIKIPEDIA__ articles: History of smartphone processors, Apple A-series processors, Snapdragon processors, Samsung Exynos processors, MediaTek Dimensity processors, Huawei Kirin processors, Intel smartphone processors, Qualcomm Snapdragon processors, ARM Cortex processors, Mobile computing
- Format: markdown links only, sandbox-local, no fabrication

Synthesis requirements:
- task_type: timeline
- eras: 2007-2009, 2010-2014, 2015-2019, 2020-2026
- min_per_era: {wiki: 3, shopping: 3, reddit: 3}
- taxonomy_branches: ARM Cortex, Qualcomm Snapdragon, Apple A-series, Samsung Exynos, MediaTek Dimensity, Huawei Kirin, Intel, Other
- min_taxonomy_leaves_with_evidence: 6
- debunked_myths_count: 7
- min_per_myth: {wiki: 1, reddit: 1}
- explicitly_forbid_top10: true
author_notes: Deep-tier task generated by gen_task_spec.py from configs/deep_topics/smartphone_processor_timeline.yaml. Golden: must=130, pool=375.
